payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Close-up of a dark mahogany-stained wooden cabinet door with a recessed central panel and simple molded frame, glossy finish with slight surface wear; vertically oriented and slightly edge-cropped in the image, no hardware visible — estimated distance about 0.6 m from camera.

message.content: {"label":"cabinet","short_description":"dark mahogany cabinet door (edge-cropped)","long_description":"Close-up of a dark mahogany-stained wooden cabinet door with a recessed central panel and simple molded frame, glossy finish with slight surface wear; vertically oriented and slightly edge-cropped in the image, no hardware visible — estimated distance about 0.6 m from camera.","attributes":["dark mahogany","wooden","recessed/raised central panel","molded frame edges","glossy finish","vertical rectangular","minor surface wear","no visible hardware","edge-cropped"],"distance_from_camera_m":0.6}
